\maketitle

\begin{abstract}
This paper presents a novel approach to image classification using transformer architectures.
We achieve state-of-the-art results on ImageNet with 85.2\% top-1 accuracy.
\end{abstract}

\section{Introduction}
Deep learning has revolutionized computer vision. In this paper, we propose a new method.

\section{Related Work}
Prior work includes ResNet and ViT. Our method builds on these foundations.

\section{Method}
We use a transformer encoder with 12 layers and 768 hidden dimensions.

\section{Experiments}
We evaluate on ImageNet and CIFAR-100. Results show significant improvements over baselines.

\section{Conclusion}
We presented a transformer-based method for image classification achieving strong results.
